_doc: gemini-hooks.json — Gemini CLI hooksConfig snippet → Cognit inbox. Reference producer, ships at repo-root hooks/gemini-cli/. Drop under ~/.gemini/settings.json (user layer) or .gemini/settings.json (project layer). Each shell command below is documented in docs/hooks/gemini-cli.md; the AfterTool -> observation_recorded wiring ships here, the BeforeTool -> hypothesis_created block is the deferred companion. The shell scripts read Gemini's event JSON from stdin, build an envelope v1.2.0 FLAT (actor_name / actor_type) per packages/wrap/src/index.ts:72, and atomic-write it to <projectRoot>/.cognit/inbox/<session-id>-<event-id>.json (project-relative, with $COGNIT_INBOX override) following packages/wrap/src/atomic-write.ts (open(O_CREAT|O_EXCL|O_WRONLY) -> write -> fsync -> close -> rename). Session id resolution order: $COGNIT_SESSION_ID -> ./.cognit/current-session -> placeholder (fires unknown_session_id sidecar, the documented bootstrap flow). Cognit is per-project local-first — the canonical inbox is the project-relative ./.cognit/inbox/, NOT ~/.cognit/inbox/.
